D:\MiKTeX\strawberry-perl-5.42.2.1-64bit-portable\c\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\genSimMatrix.dir/objects.a
D:\MiKTeX\strawberry-perl-5.42.2.1-64bit-portable\c\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\genSimMatrix.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\genSimMatrix.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\MiKTeX\strawberry-perl-5.42.2.1-64bit-portable\c\bin\c++.exe  -fopenmp -Wall  -Wextra  -O3 -DNDEBUG -g0 -O2  -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\genSimMatrix.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o genSimMatrix.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libgenSimMatrix.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\genSimMatrix.dir\linkLibs.rsp
